# OrqaStudio CLI

Command-line interface for OrqaStudio — validation, graph browsing, plugin management, version syncing, and dev environment maintenance.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @orqastudio/cli
```

## Usage

See the [CLI reference documentation](documentation/cli-reference.md) or run `orqa --help`.

## Development

```bash
npm install
npm run build
```
